zh.lifeSummary: 當Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg於1325年出生在丹麥維斯亞藍德福格萊比格斯卡福特盧普時，他的父親Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg26歲，母親Karen Andersdatter26歲。他和Cathrine至少有1個兒子。他去世於1379年之後在丹麥索洛林斯泰德瓦爾奧利勒，埋葬在丹麥維斯亞藍德林斯泰德瓦爾奧利勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg于1325年出生在丹麦維斯亞藍德福格萊比格斯卡福特盧普时，他的父亲Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg26岁，母亲Karen Andersdatter26岁。他和Cathrine至少有1个儿子。他去世于1379年之后在丹麦索洛林斯泰德瓦爾奧利勒，埋葬在丹麦維斯亞藍德林斯泰德瓦爾奧利勒。

nameMeanings.name: Peder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Nielsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Niels, Jorgen, Knud, Lars, Nels, Bent, Borge, Holger, Ove, Einer, Oluf.
Danish, Norwegian, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Niels, a shortened form of Nikolaus (see Nicholas ). Compare Nielson , Neilsen , Nelsen , Nilsen , and Nilson .

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Neilsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Ejnar, Gurli, Jorgen, Nels, Niels.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Nielsen  . Compare   Neilson   3.

variants.name: Nelsen
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as either a patronymic from   Neil   or a metronymic from   Nell .  Use as a given name probably began as a tribute to the British admiral  Lord Nelson  (  1758–1805 ), the victor of the Battle of Trafalgar;  see also  Horatio .  It is, however, now much more common in the United States than in Britain, its popularity there in the 1930s and 40s no doubt having been influenced by the American film actor and singer  Nelson Eddy  (  1901–67 ). Nowadays the name is universally associated with the South African statesman  Nelson Mandela  (  b. 1918 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg was born in 1325, in Skafterup, Fuglebjerg, Vestsjælland, Denmark, his father, Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg, was 26 and his mother, Karen Andersdatter, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Cathrine. He died after 1379, in Valsølille, Ringsted, Sorø, Denmark, and was buried in Valsølille, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg est né en 1325, à Skafterup, Fuglebjerg, Vestsjælland, Danemark, son père, Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Karen Andersdatter, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Cathrine. Il est décédé après 1379, à Valsølille, Ringsted, Sorø, Danemark, et a été enterré à Valsølille, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg 1325 in Skafterup, Fuglebjerg, Vestsjælland, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg 26 und seine Mutter Karen Andersdatter 26. Er hatte mit Cathrine mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1379 in Valsølille, Ringsted, Sorø, Dänemark und wurde in Valsølille, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg è nato il nel 1325 nel Skafterup, Fuglebjerg, Vestsjælland, Danimarca, il suo padre, Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Karen Andersdatter, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Cathrine. Morì dopo il 1379, nel Valsølille, Ringsted, Sorø, Danimarca, e fu sepolto a Valsølille, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjægが1325年にデンマークベストスジaeランドフウグレブジャーグスカフテルップで生まれた時，父Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjægは26歳，母Karen Andersdatterは26歳であった。彼はCathrineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1379年以後にデンマークソルoリングステドヴァルスoリルで死去し，デンマークベストスジaeランドリングステドヴァルスoリルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg(이)가 1325년 덴마크 베스츠jae랜드 프글레브j르그 스카프터업에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Karen Andersdatter(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Cathrine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1379년 이후 덴마크 소o 링스테드 발스o리에서 사망했으며 덴마크 베스츠jae랜드 링스테드 발스o리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg nasceu em 1325, em Skafterup, Fuglebjerg, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, seu pai, Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Karen Andersdatter, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Cathrine. Ele faleceu após 1379, em Valsølille, Ringsted, Sorø, Dinamarca, e foi sepultado em Valsølille, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg родился в 1325 г. в местности скафтэруп, фьуглебджирг, весцджaeлланд, Дания, его отцу по имени Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Karen Andersdatter, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Cathrine. Он умер после 1379 г. в местности валсoлилл, рингстед, сорo, Дания и был похоронен в местности валсoлилл, рингстед, весцджaeлланд, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Væbner Peder Nielsen Jernskjæg nació en 1325, en Skafterup, Fuglebjerg, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, su papá, Adelsmand Niels Pedersen Jernskjæg, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Karen Andersdatter, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Cathrine. Murió después de 1379, en Valsølille, Ringsted, Sorø, Dinamarca, y fue sepultado en Valsølille, Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca.
